results.title: Folate targeted enhanced tumor and folate receptor positive tissue optical imaging technology
results.abstract: A method of differentiating tumors from healthy cells in tissue is disclosed. The method includes the steps of providing a marker-folate conjugate, placing the marker-folate conjugate in contact with the tissue and viewing the tissue.

results.abstract: The present invention relates to a system and method for determining a vital sign of a subject. results.title: System and methods for processing analyte sensor data for sensor calibration
results.abstract: Systems and methods for processing sensor analyte data are disclosed, including initiating calibration, updating calibration, evaluating clinical acceptability of reference and sensor analyte data, and evaluating the quality of sensor calibration. results.abstract: In order to monitor and guide clinical trials in progress, the “rader” system is provided.
